title: Multi-Platform Agent Template Export
protocol: Each sub-handover agent (a, b, c) updates its section below after completing work or audit fixes. Read before starting to avoid conflicts.

audit_fixes.issue: downloads.py:540 — stage_slash_commands() called without platform param in token-based download flow
audit_fixes.fix: Added platform=platform to stage_slash_commands() call in generate_download_token endpoint

audit_fixes.issue: downloads.py:696 — legacy comment referenced old /gil_get_claude_agents command
file_staging.py module docstring showed old signatures without platform param
audit_fixes.fix: Updated docstring examples to include platform parameter

audit_fixes.issue: 5 user-facing docs still referenced /gil_get_claude_agents instead of /gil_get_agents

audit_not_fixed.issue: Completed handovers and docs/archive still reference old /gil_get_claude_agents
audit_not_fixed.reason: Historical records — should not be modified

audit_fixes.issue: 5 frontend test files still stubbed/mocked deleted ClaudeCodeExport + SlashCommandSetup components
audit_fixes.fix: Replaced with AgentExport stubs in all 5 test files. Updated assertion in UserSettings.spec.js from testing old components to testing AgentExport.

audit_fixes.issue: Dead doc: CLAUDE_CODE_EXPORT_TEST_SUMMARY.md for deleted component

audit_not_fixed.issue: docs/cleanup/dependency_graph.json and dependency_graph.html reference deleted components
audit_not_fixed.reason: Generated reference files — will be stale until next regeneration, not worth manual patching

0836b.notes: downloads.py:540 platform param fix and docs updates were done by 0836a agent — confirmed clean from 0836b perspective. Bootstrap templates verified in sync between backend and frontend.

cross_cutting_findings.old_command_rename: /gil_get_claude_agents -> /gil_get_agents. Source code is clean. User-facing docs fixed by 0836a agent. Completed handovers left as-is (historical).
cross_cutting_findings.platform_param_plumbing: All paths now pass platform through: MCP tool, direct ZIP download, token-based download. 0836a verified all 3 flows.
